overall.description: Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk along a desert road on the outskirts of Night City. The camera moves steadily past sparse desert vegetation and utility poles while futuristic industrial buildings and a massive communication tower dominate the distant skyline. Several vehicles pass by on the road as the perspective shifts toward a large industrial complex.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert vista with the futuristic Night City skyline visible in the far distance. The camera moves forward from the sandy desert scrubland onto a paved road with concrete sidewalk, passing abandoned ruins and utility poles as the city skyline shifts toward the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the desert road, the camera passes utility poles lining the route while the massive industrial tower becomes visible on the right horizon. Vehicles including a black pickup truck pass by on the road, and the city skyline shifts further to the right as desert hills appear on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the massive industrial tower and adjacent complex buildings on the right, with the structure growing larger in the frame. Several vehicles including a red sports car pass by on the road as the surrounding desert vegetation gives way to the industrial landscape, and the utility poles pass by closer to the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, desolate desert vista toward a towering industrial complex on the outskirts of a futuristic city. It begins in sandy scrubland, moving from the open terrain onto a paved road with concrete sidewalks and abandoned ruins as the distant skyline shifts toward the right of the frame. As the camera progresses along the route, utility poles line the path and desert hills emerge on the left, while a black pickup truck and other vehicles pass by. The scene then shifts as the massive industrial tower on the right horizon grows larger and more dominant in the frame. Finally, the surrounding desert vegetation gives way to a dense industrial landscape, with a red sports car speeding past as the camera closes in on the sprawling complex.
